_raw: {"job_title":"Cloud Engineer","company":"Microsoft Corporation (via TechMahindra/Allyis)","summary":"Results-driven Engineering Manager and SRE Leader with 16+ years of experience in production engineering, incident management, and operational excellence at scale. Proven track record leading global teams ensuring 99.9%+ SLA compliance across mission-critical production services. Expert in leveraging AI/ML to automate operational workflows, achieving 30-35% automated incident resolution. Passionate about building high-performing teams, driving architectural innovation, and scaling reliability without scaling headcount. Open to relocation to New York, NY.","skills":["SLAs/SLOs/SLIs, Error Budgets, Incident Management, Change Management, On-Call DRI, Operational Excellence SRE \& Reliability","Azure (App Insights, Log Analytics, Key Vault, Data Factory, Front Door), Multi-Cloud Operations, Container Orchestration, Fleet Management Cloud \& Infrastructure","AIOps, Azure SRE AI Agent, Intelligent Alerting, Automated Remediation, Capacity Forecasting, Multi-Agent Orchestration AI \& Automation","Kusto/KQL, Power BI, Application Insights, Geneva Dashboards, ICM, Custom Alerting Frameworks Observability \& Tooling","Azure DevOps Pipelines, CI/CD, Git, PowerShell, Python, Go (learning) DevOps \& Programming","Team Development, Performance Management, Executive Communication, Cross-Functional Collaboration, Global Coordination Leadership"],"experience":[{"role":"Lead Escalations Manager","company":"Microsoft Corporation (via TechMahindra/Allyis)","location":"Redmond, WA","dates":"May 2021 - Present","details":["Led production orchestration for 20+ mission-critical production services maintaining 99.9%+ SLA compliance in a 24/7/365 operational environment","Drove operational efficiency from 85% to 98% through systematic process improvements, alert optimization, and automation initiatives","Architected Azure SRE AI Agent platform using first AI-driven incident automation achieving 30-35% automated resolution and saving 150+ engineering hours annually","Reduced issue resolution time by 32% through escalation framework redesign and process engineering","Streamlined 500+ alerts and remediated 25,000+ stale incidents/false positives, significantly reducing operational toil","Managed CI/CD pipelines (ADO/Git) for production deployments; drove ADF pipeline reliability optimization (identified 60% of incidents from trigger failures)","Designed AI copilots (ADO Bug Intelligence, RF Insights, CAD Support) achieving ~$122K estimated cost savings","Coached and mentored junior engineers; drove team performance reviews and professional development planning"]},{"role":"Azure Support Technical Lead","company":"Microsoft Corporation (via Mindtree)","location":"Redmond, WA","dates":"Nov 2016 - May 2021","details":["Led team of 15 engineers driving enterprise customer support initiatives across Azure infrastructure services","Managed Azure Enterprise Agreement enrollments, subscription management, and capacity planning for enterprise accounts","Triaged advanced networking, storage, and identity issues across multi-vendor cloud environments","Spearheaded cross-functional collaboration with engineering, product, and account teams to resolve systemic issues","Championed bug reporting and product enhancement initiatives driving platform improvements"]},{"role":"Operations Lead","company":"Microsoft Corporation (via Mindtree)","location":"Hyderabad, India","dates":"May 2012 - Nov 2016","details":["Led team of 32 engineers coordinating across time zones","Managed fleet-level health monitoring and troubleshooting from cluster to blade level across Azure platforms","Built PowerShell automation frameworks saving thousands of manual hours annually in operational toil reduction","Created 200+ bugs and feature upgrades during ICM, JIT, and Azure KeyVault platform onboarding","Grew from Technical Senior Operations Engineer to Operations Lead through demonstrated leadership"]},{"role":"Systems Analyst / Data Center Engineer","company":"IBM (via Infosoft Inc)","location":"Hammond, IN","dates":"Sep 2009 - Nov 2011","details":["Enterprise server builds, cluster configuration, and large-scale data migrations in data center environments","Infrastructure engineering: patches, hotfixes, service packs across networked server fleet"]},{"role":"Bachelor of Engineering, Computer Science","degree":"JNTU, Hyderabad (2008)","institution":"JNTU, Hyderabad","year":"2008"}}]
